whats_great: Environment variables used for all API keys and secrets
Helmet.js middleware configured on Express server
SQL queries use parameterised bindings via better-sqlite3
Docker commands validated against an allowlist before execution
CORS restricted to localhost origins only

concerns.description: User-supplied container name passed directly to exec() without sanitisation
concerns.recommendation: Validate container names against a strict alphanumeric + hyphen pattern before passing to shell commands

concerns.description: Volume browser accepts relative file paths from the client without normalising or restricting to the volume root
concerns.recommendation: Use path.resolve() and verify the resolved path starts with the expected volume mount directory

concerns.description: Global error handler returns full stack traces in non-production mode — stack traces visible when NODE_ENV is unset
concerns.recommendation: Default to production-safe error responses when NODE_ENV is not explicitly set to 'development'

concerns.description: License validation endpoint has no rate limiting — allows unlimited retry attempts
concerns.recommendation: Add express-rate-limit middleware to authentication and license endpoints

concerns.description: Docker log output rendered with dangerouslySetInnerHTML to preserve ANSI colour formatting
concerns.recommendation: Use a safe ANSI-to-HTML library like anser with output sanitised through DOMPurify

concerns.description: License token stored in localStorage — accessible to any script running on the page
concerns.recommendation: Move token to an httpOnly cookie or use sessionStorage as a minimum improvement

concerns.description: Project name field accepts any string without length or character restrictions
concerns.recommendation: Validate project names — max length, alphanumeric + hyphens only, no path separators

recommendations: Sanitise all user input before passing to shell commands — especially Docker CLI operations
Add path traversal protection to the volume browser endpoint
Implement rate limiting on authentication and license validation routes
Replace dangerouslySetInnerHTML in LogViewer with a safe rendering approach
Default error handler should assume production when NODE_ENV is unset
Add input validation schemas to all POST/PUT endpoints
pen_test_notes: GET /api/docker/status returns Docker Engine version — useful for fingerprinting
WebSocket endpoint accepts connections before authentication handshake on slow networks
Volume browser could be used to read sensitive files if path traversal is not fixed
No Content-Security-Policy header set — allows inline scripts if XSS is achieved
